accomplishments.title: shawnos locale guide guide chapter page

commits.message: fix(shawnos): green build — guard guide chapters with no markdown yet
docs(railway): correct PostHog env guidance — kill the us.posthog.com trap
feat(shawnos): phase 1-2 frontend — centered pill nav, kill tri-edge dock, immersive homepage
feat(shawnos): phase 3 design system — hybrid font, B&W tokens, hero fix
fix(shawnos seo): add BreadcrumbSchema + hreflang to gap routes
docs(seo): record live GSC DNS-TXT verification values for shawnos.ai
feat(shawnos blog): surface evergreen posts, retire claude-daily from index + freshness support
fix(shawnos): relaunch staleness pass — kill 3-month-old claims
feat(shawnos): feature the Clearbox demo on the homepage + make it reusable
style(shawnos): finish B&W pass — neutralize brand green on secondary pages
fix(shawnos): honest reddit labels + OG image caching
style(shawnos): phase 1 — tighten hero, define the nav pill, de-square cards
feat(shawnos): phase 2 — one knowledge surface, two lenses
feat(shawnos): phase 3 — surface blog higher + topic navigation
feat(shawnos): phase 4a — rebrand the daily as Aura, two streams
feat: phase 4b — revive the daily generator + seed both desks
feat(shawnos): phase 7 — sharpen the GTM-engineer narrative + surface /built

dev_equivalent.explanation: A mid-level developer writes ~150 lines of production code per day at ~$500/day (fully loaded). Today's 14,348 net lines represent approximately 96 developer-days of output — what a small team would produce in 4+ months.

assumptions.basis: Industry average for meaningful, reviewed, production-quality code
